description: A customer received the wrong item in their online order and contacts customer service via chat.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the order details.

nodes.task_description: Apologize and create a no-charge replacement order for the correct item.

expected_outcome.value: A new order is placed to send the correct item.

nodes.task_description: Email the customer a pre-paid return shipping label to send back the incorrect item.

expected_outcome.value: The customer is provided with an easy way to return the wrong item at no cost.
